title: Cobblemon Spawn Chaining
description: What if you could chain spawns... in Cobblemon?
body:
# Spawn Chaining

v1.7.3-1.1

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-spawn-chaining)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-spawn-chaining)

[GitHub](https://github.com/timinc-cobble/cobblemon-spawn-chainer)

## What if…

…you could chain spawns... in Cobblemon?

## Features

- When a player KOs/captures a Pokémon, adds a chance for that same Pokémon species/form to spawn on that player.
- The chance can be affected by the player’s [Counter](https://www.notion.so/Counter-21d57e0d4afd80d0815fc97b89368998?pvs=21) stats.
- The game can optionally notify the player of the successful chain.
- A blacklist/whitelist filter out/only allow Pokémon that you want to be chainable.
- The level can be tweaked to randomize a little on the spawned Pokémon, allowing you to keep it within reason.

## Dependencies

- [Cobblemon](https://www.notion.so/Cobblemon-22157e0d4afd80a49896c70a775a3c7f?pvs=21)
- [Tim Core](https://www.notion.so/Tim-Core-22057e0d4afd809b9c02e78f26805376?pvs=21)
- [Counter](https://www.notion.so/Counter-21d57e0d4afd80d0815fc97b89368998?pvs=21)

## Testing

In order to test the mod, simply load it up, give yourself a Master Ball, spawn a Aurorus with `/pokespawn aurorus`, catch the Aurorus, and give it a second to override the next spawned Pokémon.

## Known Issues

- ≤v1.7.1-1.1.0 wasn’t referencing the context configs appropriately (it was trynna get them by path when they were keyed by the full string version of the ID). v1.7.1-1.1.1 fixes this.

## Roadmap

If you’d like to keep up with the work being done on the mod, please join [the Discord](https://discord.com/invite/WKAR27SdSv) and subscribe to notifications on the channel for this content. You can also keep track of the to do list available on the mod’s main page ([Spawn Chaining](https://www.notion.so/Spawn-Chaining-28057e0d4afd80b48604fd8c87da5539?pvs=21)).

## Feedback

If you have any questions or requests concerning the mod, or just want to drop by and say hi, visit us over at [the Discord](https://discord.com/invite/WKAR27SdSv)!

## Support

If I've made something you enjoyed or helped you make something, please consider [dropping a tip in the cup](https://ko-fi.com/timsminecraftmods) and mention how I helped if you'd like!
